zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford於1312年3月12日出生在英國奧可福爾奧可福德時，他的父親Sir Alphonse de Vere11309歲，母親Joan Foliot31歲。他於1334年與Maud de Badlesmere在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1330年登記服兵役。他去世於1360年1月24日在法國哈帕格萊姆斯享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford于1312年3月12日出生在英国奧可福爾奧可福德时，他的父亲Sir Alphonse de Vere11309岁，母亲Joan Foliot31岁。他于1334年与Maud de Badlesmere在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1330年登记服兵役。他去世于1360年1月24日在法国哈帕格萊姆斯享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford was born on 12 March 1312, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Sir Alphonse de Vere, was 11309 and his mother, Joan Foliot, was 31. He married Maud de Badlesmere in 1334, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1330. He died on 24 January 1360, in Reims, Champagne, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford est né le 12 mars 1312, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alphonse de Vere, avait 11309 ans et sa mère, Joan Foliot, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Badlesmere en 1334, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1330. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1360, à Reims, Champagne, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford am 12. März 1312 in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alphonse de Vere 11309 und seine Mutter Joan Foliot 31. Er hat 1334 in Oxfordshire, England Maud de Badlesmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1330 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. Januar 1360 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Reims, Champagne, Frankreich und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Maud de Badlesmere nel 1334, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1330. ja.lifeSummary: John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxfordが1312年3月12日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Alphonse de Vereは11309歳，母Joan Foliotは31歳であった。1334年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでMaud de Badlesmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年に兵役登録をした。彼は1360年1月24日にフランスチャンプアグンレイムズで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford(이)가 1312년 3월 12일 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alphonse de Vere(은)는 11309세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Foliot(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Maud de Badlesmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1360년 1월 24일 프랑스 챔파그니 레임스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford nasceu em 12 de março de 1312, em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alphonse de Vere, tinha 11309 anos e sua mãe, Joan Foliot, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Badlesmere em 1334, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1330. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1360, em Reims, Champagne, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford родился 12 марта 1312 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alphonse de Vere было 11309 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Foliot, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Badlesmere в 1334 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1330 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 января 1360 г. в местности римс, чампагн, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford nació el 12 de marzo de 1312, en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alphonse de Vere, tenía 11309 años y su mamá, Joan Foliot, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Maud de Badlesmere en 1334, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1330. Murió el 24 de enero de 1360, en Reims, Champagne, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
